title: Finote Selam Heat Wave
lead: Finote Selam is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.14. This extreme weather event has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating severe conditions.
body:
The heat wave in Finote Selam has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 29%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 8.6 km/h, offering little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
